description: Base commands that bypass the human approval prompt when CommandValidationSettings.enable_auto_approve is true. Auto-approved commands MUST still pass all hard safety gates (forbidden patterns, blacklist, whitelist if enabled). This file lists the platform-default 'rubber-stamped as benign' base commands. The CSV CommandValidationSettings.auto_approved_commands field augments this list per-user.

auto_approved_commands.reason: Reports system uptime; no side effects
Reports disk free space; no side effects
Reports memory usage; no side effects
Reports current user; no side effects
Reports user/group ids; no side effects
Reports current date/time; no side effects
Reports kernel info; no side effects
